step_rationale: Cytoprotective eicosanoid; cardioprotection and resolution of cardiac inflammation during myocardial healing.
mechanism: Epoxyeicosatrienoic acids are cardioprotective lipid mediators derived from arachidonic acid that promote myocardial repair and inflammation resolution.

references.title: Lipoxygenase drives lipidomic and metabolic reprogramming in ischemic heart failure.
Use of metabolomic profiling in the study of arachidonic acid metabolism in cardiovascular disease.
